      • storePersistentData

        public abstract void storePersistentData​(int id,
                                         Uint8Vector buffer)
        Callback function called when Aspen wants to store persistent data

        Called when using the VirtualDeviceService and the virtual device wants to
        store data persistently on a file system. The file name must contain the
        provided parameter id so it's possible to retrieve it when the function
        load_persistent_data is called.

        Parameters:
        id - The file id
        buffer - A byte vector containing the data to be stored

      • loadPersistentData

        public abstract Uint8Vector loadPersistentData​(int id,
                                               long max_len)
        Callback function called when Aspen wants to load persistent data

        Called when using the VirtualDeviceService and the virtual device wants to
        load data from a file. The id must be retrieved from the stored file name.

        Parameters:
        id - The file id
        max_len - The maximum number of bytes to be read. It may be fewer.
        If more, return empty vector.
        Returns:
        A byte vector with the loaded data

      • startToneGeneratorAudioStream

        public abstract void startToneGeneratorAudioStream​(int sample_rate)
        Callback function called when Aspen wants to start an audio stream

        Called when using the VirtualDeviceService and the virtual device wants to
        start an audio stream to be used for the tone generator.

        Parameters:
        sample_rate - The sample rate in Hz

      • stopToneGeneratorAudioStream

        public abstract void stopToneGeneratorAudioStream()
        Callback function called when Aspen wants to stop an audio stream

        Called when using the VirtualDeviceService and the virtual device wants to
        stop an audio stream used for the tone generator.
